name: SM-HW-S1b-006_TensionBracket_v01_FROM_JSON
_comment: S1b TensionBracket per Hardware/S1b_Conveyor/SW_Design_Guide.md §13.3. Origin = center of axle bore on inboard cap face; +X = along slot, +Y = outboard (toward outside of side plate), +Z = up. Spec uses Front Plane (XY, normal +Z) for the first sketch -- the design guide says 'Top Plane' but means an XY plane with +Z extrude direction; in SW's English template Front Plane is XY. The inboard cap rectangle is offset so its -Y edge sits on the origin (inboard face at Y=0). Subsequent slabs sketch on the +z face of the previous extrude, exercising the new sketch_rectangle_on_face primitive added 2026-05-17.

features._comment: Step 2: Inboard cap. 20 (X) x 15 (Y) x 3 (Z). Rectangle shifted so -Y edge sits at Y=0 (origin is on the inboard face). Center at (0, S1B_TB_Y_OUTBOARD/2 = 7.5) puts the Y span at [0, 15].
features.name: SK_InboardCap

features._comment: Step 3: Slot slab on +z face of inboard cap. 8.5 (X) x 15 (Y) x 5 (Z). X-narrower than cap so cap acts as flange. EMPIRICAL: SW puts the face-sketch origin at the part-origin PROJECTION onto the face, NOT at the face geometric center. Inboard cap's +z face has part-origin projection at (0, 0, 3), but the cap centroid is at (0, 7.5, 3). To align the slab Y span with the cap Y span [0, 15], shift center +v by 7.5mm.
features.name: SK_SlotSlab

features._comment: Step 4: Outboard cap on +z face of slot slab. Same footprint as inboard cap: 20 (X) x 15 (Y) x 3 (Z). Same +v shift as the slot slab to align with cap centroid (Y=7.5).
features.name: SK_OutboardCap

features._comment: Step 5: Axle bore through all 11 mm. Circle on +z face of outboard cap, centered on the bracket centroid (X=0, Y=7.5 in part frame). Per the EMPIRICAL face-sketch-origin discovery (see SK_SlotSlab comment), sketch (u=0, v=0) lands at part-origin projection (0, 0) = inboard-edge of cap, NOT the centroid. Shift v=+7.5 to put the bore at the bracket centroid. Ø8.2 (S1B_TB_BORE = S1B_AXLE_DIA + 0.2) grips axle tightly.
features.name: SK_AxleBore
